DEFENDANT SHOWED UP IN COURT AT 11:17AM, BY THEN PLAINTIFF HAD ALREADY LEFT THE COURTROOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

(SC-225) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS (SC-225) ORDER OR DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS: THE COURT ORDERS: [X] THE PAYMENT ORDER REFERRED TO IN [X] IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAZO, EDUARDO A

ORDER ON THE DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS. THE PAYMENT ORDER (ISSUED ON APR-04-2014) IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE.THE FOLLOWING AMOUNTS ARE OWING ON THE JUDGMENT AS OF MAY-08-2014:PRINCIPLAL BALANCE OF JUDGMENT AND COSTS INCLUDED IN JUDGMENT:$8,904.00.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, AMANDA M HEARING SET FOR NOV-03-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAYS $500 TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR TODAY AND, IF JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAYS TO CREDITOR $4,500 BY THE END OF NOVEMBER 2014 THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE SATISFIED. IF THE $4,500 PAYMENT IS NOT PAID BY NOVEMBER 30, 2014 THEN DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY $500 PER MONTH UNTIL THE ENTIRE JUDGMENT IS PAID. A MISSED JUDGMENT WILL RESULT IN A JUDGMENT FOR THE UNPAID & BALANCE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $59.00) SERVED JAN-10-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, AMANDA M

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAZO, EDUARDO A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMPSON, AMANDA M $9,870.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,004.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
